name: skill-seekers
description: -Automatically convert documentation websites, GitHub repositories, and PDFs into Claude AI skills in minutes.
capabilities: Extract content from documentation websites and preserve structure
Parse GitHub repository README files and documentation folders
Convert PDF documents into skill-compatible text format
Format extracted content into Claude skill templates
Handle multiple input sources in a single conversion session
Generate properly structured skill metadata and instructions
author: sickn33
securitySummary: This skill contains only documentation metadata in SKILL.md format with no executable code. All static analyzer findings are false positives: the detected URLs are source reference links in markdown format, and there is no cryptographic code present. The skill is safe for publication.
valueStatement: Creating custom Claude skills from existing documentation is time-consuming and requires manual formatting. This skill automates the entire conversion process from websites, GitHub repos, and PDFs.
userTitle: Convert Documentation Into Claude Skills Automatically
limitations: Requires accessible URLs for web-based documentation sources
PDF conversion quality depends on document formatting and structure
Large repositories may require selective folder or file targeting
Does not execute or test the generated skills automatically

useCases.title: Technical Documentation Skills
useCases.description: Convert API documentation, framework guides, or library references into specialized Claude skills for development assistance.

useCases.title: Company Knowledge Base Import
useCases.description: Transform internal wikis, process documents, and training materials into onboarding and reference skills for team members.

useCases.title: Research Paper Integration
useCases.description: Convert academic papers, research findings, and technical specifications into reference skills for research teams.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Website Conversion
promptTemplates.prompt: Convert the documentation at [URL] into a Claude skill. Include the main sections and key concepts as skill instructions.
promptTemplates.scenario: Quick conversion of a single documentation page

promptTemplates.title: GitHub Repository Skill
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a Claude skill from the GitHub repository [REPO_URL]. Focus on the README, contributing guidelines, and docs folder. Structure it to help users understand and use this project.
promptTemplates.scenario: Building a skill from open source project documentation

promptTemplates.title: Multi-Source Documentation Hub
promptTemplates.prompt: Combine these three documentation sources into one comprehensive Claude skill: [URL1], [URL2], [PDF_PATH]. Organize by topic and create clear navigation between sections.
promptTemplates.scenario: Merging multiple documentation sources into unified skill

promptTemplates.title: Structured PDF Knowledge Base
promptTemplates.prompt: Extract and convert this technical manual [PDF_PATH] into a Claude skill. Preserve the chapter structure, create a table of contents, and add cross-references between related topics.
promptTemplates.scenario: Converting complex PDF documents with hierarchical structure

bestPractices: Review generated skills before deployment to ensure accuracy and completeness
Organize source documentation with clear headings for better skill structure
Test converted skills with sample queries to verify knowledge retrieval works correctly
antiPatterns: Converting outdated documentation without verifying current accuracy
Including sensitive information or internal URLs in public skill sources
Creating overly broad skills that combine unrelated documentation topics

faq.question: What types of websites can this skill convert?
faq.answer: Most documentation websites with standard HTML structure work well. Sites requiring authentication or heavy JavaScript rendering may need additional configuration.

faq.question: Can I convert private GitHub repositories?
faq.answer: Yes, but you need to provide appropriate access credentials. The skill will use your configured GitHub authentication to access private repos.

faq.question: How large can the source documentation be?
faq.answer: There is no hard limit, but very large documentation sets may work better when split into multiple focused skills rather than one comprehensive skill.

faq.question: Does this work with scanned PDFs or image-based documents?
faq.answer: Scanned PDFs require OCR processing first. This skill works best with text-based PDFs that have selectable text content.

faq.question: Can I update an existing skill with new documentation?
faq.answer: Yes, run the conversion again with updated sources. You can merge new content into existing skills or create versioned updates.

faq.question: What happens if a URL is inaccessible during conversion?
faq.answer: The conversion will report the error and skip that source. You can retry after fixing access issues or exclude the problematic URL.
